relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Jesus is the true vine and the Father tends the vine.
Fruitless branches are removed; fruitful branches are cleansed for more fruit.
The spoken word has already cleansed them.
Fruit comes from remaining in the vine.
He is vine, they are branches; remaining bears much fruit.
Non-remaining dries into separation.
When words remain within, asking aligns with life.
The Father is glorified by fruitful discipleship.
Father-love flows into Jesus-love; remain there.
Command-keeping is the shape of remaining in love.
His joy enters them so their joy may be fulfilled.
The command is love as he loved.
Greatest love lays down life for friends.
Friendship is lived through his command.
Servants become friends through shared knowing.
Chosen ones are appointed for remaining fruit.
The command returns again: love one another.
World-order hatred met him first.
Being chosen out of the world-order changes belonging.
The servant shares the master’s reception.
Name-related opposition flows from not knowing the Sender.
His speech exposes responsibility.
Hatred of Jesus touches the Father.
The works seen increase accountability.
Hated without cause fulfills the written word.
The Advocate, Spirit of truth from the Father, will witness concerning him.
They too bear witness because they have been with him from the beginning.
